title: coutarea alba
intro: Coutarea alba, also known as the white Coutarea or white Coutarea tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Coutarea alba include reducing fever, treating malaria, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and has also been used in traditional African medicine to treat various ailments, including snake bites and wounds.
